query:
SELECT bo.id, bo.business_name, bo.business_slug, l.id as location_id, l.name as location_name 
FROM business_owners bo 
LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.owner_id = bo.id 
WHERE bo.phone = '+15550019999' OR bo.business_name = 'Test Spa & Wellness'
LIMIT 5;
